title: tigridia molseediana
intro:
Tigridia molseediana, also known as the Mexican shell flower or the tiger flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, characterized by its vibrant, trumpet-shaped flowers and striking color patterns.

This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tigridia molseediana include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and other health issues.
